description_long: This is a traditional Yixing-style teapot made from reddish-brown clay, featuring a rounded, faceted body with a short, stout spout and a robust handle. The teapot is adorned with intricate sculpted animal motifs on the lid, handle, and spout, giving it a distinctive and artistic appearance. Chinese calligraphy is engraved on one side of the body, adding cultural and decorative value. The lid fits snugly and is topped with a small, sculpted animal figure, echoing the motifs on the handle and spout. The surface has a matte, slightly textured finish, typical of unglazed clay teapots. This teapot is compact and likely intended for brewing and serving tea in a refined setting.
description: A reddish-brown, faceted clay teapot with sculpted animal motifs, engraved calligraphy, and a snug-fitting lid. The surface is matte and slightly textured, exuding traditional Chinese artistry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout with an animal motif, the handle with a sculpted head, engraved calligraphy, and the animal-topped lid.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the thick, rounded handle with sculpted detail and the animal figure on the lid; calligraphy is not visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the spout and handle, both with animal motifs, and the faceted body with minimal surface decoration.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the handle's attachment and the lid's animal figure, with the faceted body and no visible calligraphy.
attribute_spout_orientation: The spout is short, slightly curved, and projects outward from the front of the body at a slight upward angle.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is a thick, rounded loop attached at the upper and lower rear of the body, featuring a sculpted animal head at the top attachment point.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; the lid is domed with a snug fit and topped by a sculpted animal figure.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Animal motifs on the lid, handle, and spout; engraved Chinese calligraphy on one side of the body.
